title: The Flower of the North
writer: James Oliver Curwood, Bradley J. Smollen
actors: Henry B. Walthall, Pauline Starke, Harry Northrup
plot: Two men, Philip Whittemore (Henry B. Walthall) and Thorpe (Harry Northrup) both go to the Northwest to gain the right-of-way for their railroad company from D'Arcambal (Emmett King). Whittemore arrives first and D'Arcambal refuses...
